text.title: User Control and Freedom Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply User Control and Freedom end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: scope
step.action: Confirm preconditions hold and skip-if disqualifiers do not; gather declared prerequisites.

step.name: draft
step.action: Draft a first cut of the checklist using `templates/user-control-freedom.md`; map each section to the relevant rule id.

step.name: evidence
step.action: Attach evidence (analytics, interview quotes, ticket ids, screenshots) to each claim or score; reject claims without evidence.

step.name: review
step.action: Hold a focused review with the named owner; capture decisions and follow-up tickets.

step.name: sign-off
step.action: Owner signs the artefact; bump version and last_reviewed; commit alongside the spec or feature it supports.
